docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $576.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-06-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA $546.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $586.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4.55 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO HARRISON/NIEMA RETURNED, UNCLAIMED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $575.55 AS TO DEFENDANT HARRISON NIEMA
AMENDED WRIT RECEIVED RETURNED FULLY SATISFIED. (FROM SAN MATEO COUNTY).
